component.name: AI Gate
component.summary: Access all your AI tools seamlessly in one unified desktop application

description.p: AI Gate brings all major AI assistants — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Qwen, and Grok — into one beautiful, unified desktop application. No more switching between browser tabs.

ul.li: Multi-panel workspace: view up to 3 AI tools side-by-side simultaneously
Global webview pool: switching layouts preserves all session state — no reloads, no flashing
Smart tab synchronization: synced or independent tabs per panel
Native Wayland support with automatic X11/Wayland detection
System tray integration: minimize to tray and restore instantly
Privacy first: no telemetry, no trackers

screenshot.caption: AI Gate home screen with single-panel view

description.p: Multi-Panel Workspace and Tab Management Improvements

ul.li: Global webview pool: switching layouts preserves all webview state with no reloads
Multi-panel workspace: view up to 3 AI tools simultaneously
Synced and separate tab modes across panels
Fixed tab duplication, disappearing content, and state mismatches
Smooth CSS transitions for panel repositioning
Zero TypeScript errors; production build fully optimized
